queries.question: Which field of study is the focus of project scoring more than 90 points?
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    f.name 
FROM 
    Enrollment e
    INNER JOIN Project p ON e.projectId = p.id
    INNER JOIN Field_Of_Study f 
ON p.FieldOfStudyId = f.id 
AND e.grade > 90;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?e a :Enrollments .
  ?p a :Projects .
  ?e p:hasProject ?p .
  ?f a :Field_Of_Study .
  ?p p:hasField_Of_Study ?f .
  ?f p:name ?name .
  ?e p:grade ?grade_f .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?grade_f) > 90)
}

queries.question: Which topic and field of study is the focus of project scoring more than 90 points?
queries.sql:
SELECT 
    f.name, fs.name
FROM 
    Enrollment e
    INNER JOIN Project p ON e.projectId = p.id
    INNER JOIN Topic f 
ON p.topicId = f.id 
 INNER JOIN Field_Of_Study fs 
ON p.FieldOfStudyId = fs.id 
AND e.grade > 90;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 WHERE {
  ?e a :Enrollments .
  ?p a :Projects .
  ?e p:hasProject ?p .
  ?f a :Topics .
  ?p p:hasTopic ?f .
  ?fs a :Field_Of_Study .
  ?p p:hasField_Of_Study ?fs .
  ?f p:name ?name .
  ?fs p:name ?name2 .
  ?e p:grade ?grade_f .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?grade_f) > 90)
}

queries.question: What is the field of study of the Quantum Mechanics Experiment?
queries.sql:
SELECT 
   f.name
FROM 
    Project p
    INNER JOIN Field_Of_Study f 
ON p.FieldOfStudyId = f.id 
AND p.title = 'Quantum Mechanics Experiment';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?p a :Projects .
  ?f a :Field_Of_Study .
  ?p p:hasField_Of_Study ?f .
  ?f p:name ?name .
  ?p p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Quantum Mechanics Experiment")
}

queries.question: What is the topic and field of study of the Quantum Mechanics Experiment?

   f.name, fs.name
FROM 
    Project p
    INNER JOIN Topic f 
ON p.topicId = f.id 
 INNER JOIN Field_Of_Study fs 
ON p.FieldOfStudyId = fs.id 
AND p.title = 'Quantum Mechanics Experiment';
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 WHERE {
  ?p a :Projects .
  ?f a :Topics .

  ?fs a :Field_Of_Study .
  ?p p:hasField_Of_Study ?fs .
  ?f p:name ?name .
  ?fs p:name ?name2 .
  ?p p:title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Quantum Mechanics Experiment")
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What is the focus of projects that score more than 90 points?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?e a :Enrollments .
  ?p a :Projects .
  ?e p:hasProject ?p .
  ?f a :Field_Of_Study .
  ?p p:hasField_Of_Study ?f .
  ?f p:name ?name .
  ?e p:grade ?grade_f .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?grade_f) > 90)
} }
  full: { SELECT ?name ?name2 WHERE {
  ?e a :Enrollments .
  ?p a :Projects .
  ?e p:hasProject ?p .
  ?f a :Topics .
  ?p p:hasTopic ?f .
  ?fs a :Field_Of_Study .
  ?p p:hasField_Of_Study ?fs .
  ?f p:name ?name .
  ?fs p:name ?name2 .
  ?e p:grade ?grade_f .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?grade_f) > 90)
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?e a :Enrollments .
  ?p a :Projects .
  ?e p:hasProject ?p .
  ?f a :Topics .
  ?p p:hasTopic ?f .
  ?f p:name ?name .
  ?e p:grade ?grade_f .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?grade_f) > 90)
} }
}
